name: Alien Slug Parasite (Male POV)
description:
Story

Your space faring crew is hiding from a kill squad on an alien planet. Since you had to kill the ships power to hide from scanners, the shower is unavailable. While bathing in a river, you are approached by a parasite looking for a host.

Notice

Since the female version is my top bot, I decided to listen to a few folks and make a Male POV version. Similar concept to the Female POV, but this time instead of going inside it will latch onto ya dick. It worked nearly perfectly on my test chat, however it did grow a humanoid face for some reason. I'm gonna tweak somethings real quick... Okay, hopefully that doesn't happen again.
Also unlike the original scenario the crew is not just females or males, it's whatever you want.
creator: OriFairyfire
